name: coach-wooden-and-me
description: Kareem Abdul-Jabbar's memoir of his 50-year friendship with legendary UCLA coach John Wooden — an exploration of how two seemingly opposite people from radically different backgrounds built a lifelong bond around shared values, basketball, and mutual respect.
useCase: Understanding the Coach Wooden philosophy, the Pyramid of Success, the power of cross-racial/cross-generational friendship, basketball history, and what it means to be a 'good man' in sports and life.
knownRisks: Deeply personal account from Abdul-Jabbar's perspective — not a biography of Wooden
Some stories rely on Abdul-Jabbar's memory of conversations decades later
Political and religious views (Muslim author) may not align with all readers
Some historical details about Wooden's early career are reconstructed
